name: UNI Global Union
description: Global union federation representing 20+ million workers in services and skills sectors, including graphical, packaging, commerce, finance, and post & logistics.

name: UNI Global Union — Graphical & Packaging
description: UNI's sector covering workers in printing, packaging, paper products, and related industries worldwide. Coordinates multinational bargaining and EWC work in the sector.

name: International Labour Organization (ILO)
description: Tripartite UN agency setting international labour standards. Key conventions for CBC context: C087, C098, C135, C154 (freedom of association, bargaining, workers' representatives).

name: International Trade Union Confederation (ITUC)
description: Peak international union body representing national union centres; coordinates global policy and solidarity work.

name: IndustriALL Global Union
description: Global federation for workers in mining, energy, and manufacturing industries; partners with UNI on cross-sector coordination where relevant.

name: Building and Wood Workers' International (BWI)
description: Global federation for construction, building materials, wood and forestry workers; relevant when pulp/paper upstream supply chains are involved.

name: European Trade Union Confederation (ETUC)
description: European-level union confederation representing national unions across the EU/EEA; social partner in EU-level sectoral and cross-industry social dialogue.
